query: Okay I am about to start cooking so clear the air. Air purifier 1 in the kitchen power on and set the fan to eighty percent. Stop dishwasher 1 in the kitchen to avoid the noise. The kids just got home so light 1 in the kids room power on.

It is getting warm in here so set the dining room fan 1 power on to 80 percent. Turn the kitchen light 1 power on I need more light for cooking. And set the living room blinds 1 to fully closed for privacy.

Hey, I am starting dinner so make the kitchen comfortable. Turn the kitchen light 1 power on. Set the kitchen AC 1 power on cooling and fan 70%. Also cool the kids room before they get back. Set the kids room AC 1 power on cooling and fan 70%.
I am getting settled to work so please power on office light 1. I am about to take a shower so please power on bathroom AC 1, set it to cooling and set the fan to 70 percent.
Okay, living room blinds 1 open fully, I want more light this afternoon. Living room dehumidifier 1 power on and set the fan to fifty percent, the air feels a bit muggy so run it at half.

Alright, I need full brightness to work in the office so turn on office dimmer light 1 and set it to level 100. I am about to take a shower so cool the bathroom, turn on bathroom AC 1, set it to cooling mode and the fan to 70 percent.
The living room is feeling humid this evening. Turn on dehumidifier 1 in the living room and set the fan to 80 percent.
Looks like the laundry area is heating up, turn on utility room fan 1 and set it to 50 percent. The living room is getting bright, fully close living room blinds 1 now.
Okay, turn on air purifier 1 in the bathroom and set the fan to 30 percent. I just finished a shower so keep it low to clear the humidity.
The sun is hitting my monitor, set office blinds 1 to fully closed. I just had a shower, power on bathroom fan 1 and set the fan to forty percent.
Okay I am starting dinner so set refrigerator 1 in the kitchen to 3.0 degrees Celsius and turn dimmer light 1 in the living room on and set it to level 50 for a comfortable mid afternoon light

Looks like it is getting chilly, so please set the heat pump 1 in the utility room to heating mode and set the heating setpoint to 19.0 degrees Celsius. Also, turn the living room light 1 on, I am heading in there soon.
Hey Bathroom air purifier 1 power on and set the fan to 40 percent. It is a bit steamy from the shower so run it for a few minutes to clear the humidity.

Okay, set refrigerator 1 in the kitchen to 5.0 degrees Celsius because I want the drinks chilled for later. The bathroom is a bit muggy so turn on dehumidifier 1 in the bathroom and set the fan to 70 percent. And the kids are napping, power on air purifier 1 in the kids room and set the fan to 70 percent.
Okay utility room dryer 2, turn on, set to max and start running now, I need the towels dried quickly before dinner.
Quick morning setup. Turn on kitchen light 1 in the kitchen so the counters are bright. Also turn on bathroom light 1 in the bathroom so I can get ready.
It is getting a bit dim in the living room this afternoon, can you turn on living room light 2.

Hey, the bathroom is steamy from the shower so power on bathroom dehumidifier 1 and set the fan to 60 percent to dry it out. Also power on living room dehumidifier 1 and set the fan to 60 percent to keep the humidity balanced.
Okay quick favor please power on bathroom light 1 now I need a bit more light to finish getting ready
Alright, power on living room light 1, it is getting a bit dim in here.

Starting a load of laundry, so power on the utility room dryer 1 and start it running. Also power on the utility room air purifier 1 and set the fan to 80 percent to cut lint and humidity. Finally power on the utility room AC 1, set it to cooling and the fan to 70 percent to keep the room cool.

Okay it is getting warm in the kitchen so power on AC 1 in the kitchen set it to cooling and set fan to 40 percent. Also make the office a bit dimmer for focused work power on dimmer light 1 in the office and set level 30.
Turn on bathroom light 1, I need some light to freshen up. Also set utility room blinds 1 to 50.0 percent closed to cut the glare while I check the laundry.
It is a bit dry in the bathroom this morning, turn on humidifier 1 in the bathroom and set the fan to 60 percent. Pause washer 1 in the utility room now, I will grab the laundry in a few minutes.
Putting the groceries away so set the kitchen freezer 1 to minus twenty point zero degrees Celsius. The bathroom feels stuffy so power on the bathroom air purifier 1 and set its fan to fifty percent.
It is a bit damp in the utility room, so turn on utility room fan 1 and set it to 50 percent. Also power on utility room dryer 1 and start it running.
Okay it is getting dark and I need to finish a report in the office. Turn on light 1 in the office please.
Okay, I just moved the laundry over, utility room dryer 1 power on, set it to low and start running now.
Okay, bathroom humidifier 1 power on and set the fan to 30 percent, I want a little humidity while I get ready.
Alright the clothes are dry so pause dryer 1 in the utility room please
Alright, the kids will be back from school soon so get the room ready. Turn on kids room light 1 and turn on kids room air purifier 1 and set its fan to fifty percent.

Hey Google, I am about to shower so please turn Bathroom light 1 on and fully close Bathroom blinds 1 for privacy. The living room is feeling muggy, please power on Living room dehumidifier 2 and set its fan to seventy percent.
Okay, pause dryer 1 in the utility room for a minute, I am going to swap the laundry. Also set freezer 1 in the kitchen to minus 20.0 degrees Celsius.
Okay set living room TV 1 to SBS and stop kitchen dishwasher 1 now so it is stopped.

Alright, make the living room fresher, living room air purifier 1 power on and set the fan to 70 percent. I am starting laundry, utility room dimmer light 1 power on and set the level to 90 percent. The bathroom feels chilly, bathroom heat pump 2 switch to heating mode and set the heating setpoint to 15.5 degrees Celsius.
Kids are napping so keep it gentle, turn on kids room air purifier 2 and set the fan to thirty percent.
Alright, the table needs light for lunch, turn on dining room light 1. Also, give the bathroom some ventilation, turn on bathroom fan 2 and set it to 50 percent.

Alright, it has gotten warm this afternoon, turn on the living room AC 1, set it to cooling and set the fan to 70 percent. The dining room feels a bit stuffy, turn on the dining room air purifier 1 and set the fan to 70 percent. There was cooking earlier, switch on the kitchen dehumidifier 1 and set the fan to 70 percent.
The evening is getting warm, cool down the living room. Turn on the living room AC 1, switch it to cooling mode and set the fan to sixty percent.

Okay smart home I am heading out and need the laundry and dishes stopped. The clothes are done so stop utility room washer 1 and stop utility room dryer 1 please. The dishwasher cycle finished so stop kitchen dishwasher 1 please.
The sun is streaming in so set the living room blinds 1 to fully closed and I need louder sound so set the living room TV 1 to level 70.
Okay I am about to start cooking and the kitchen is a bit dim. Turn on kitchen light 1.

Okay, need to get a load going in the utility room. Utility room washer 2 power on and start running. Utility room dryer 1 power on and start running. While that runs, keep the living room breezy. Living room fan 2 power on and set fan to seventy percent.
It is getting dark in the living room. Turn on living room light 1. I am bringing stuff through and need a bit of light.

It is a bit muggy in the study, so turn study room dehumidifier 1 on and set its fan to 60 percent. It is warm this afternoon in the living room, so turn living room fan 1 on and set it to 60 percent.

I am getting ready so brighten things up in the bathroom, turn on bathroom dimmer light 1 and set it to 90 percent. Keep the groceries cold, set kitchen refrigerator 1 to 5.0 degrees Celsius. The bedroom feels warm so cool it down, turn on bedroom AC 2, set it to cooling mode and the fan to 70 percent.
Okay dinner is finished so stop dishwasher 1 in the kitchen now. Set TV 1 in the living room to level 50 so the volume is comfortable.
The bathroom is a bit stuffy after the shower. Turn on bathroom air purifier 1 and set the fan to 30 percent.

Okay, I need good light in the bathroom to get ready so turn on bathroom light 1 now. Also, the living room should be lit since I will walk through it so turn on living room light 1. Finally, set kitchen blinds 1 to 25.0 percent closed to cut the glare on the countertops.
It is a bit stuffy in the utility room, so power on fan 1 in the utility room and set it to fifty percent. And turn on light 1 in the kitchen so I have light for cooking.
